CheckTitle: Check if E2E Networks floating IPs are attached to nodes
Description: This check verifies that E2E Networks floating (reserved) IP addresses are attached to a node instead of being left unassigned, since idle floating IPs can be reassigned unexpectedly.
Risk: Unattached floating IPs may be reassigned unexpectedly and disrupt secure routing assumptions.

Recommendation.Text: Attach unassigned floating IPs to the intended node or release them if they are no longer needed.
